text.title: SLO Burn Decision Matrix Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: enumerate-service-classes
step.action: Pick 3-5 classes (user-facing critical, user-facing standard, async worker, batch, internal).

step.name: fill-matrix-cells
step.action: Fill every (category, class) cell with a single named action.

step.name: wire-webhook
step.action: Configure alertmanager webhook to route-burn-alert.py. Test with a fake alert.
step.note: Gate: If webhook doesn't page named owner, STOP — fix routing.

step.name: publish-audit-pipeline
step.action: Ship matrix events to SIEM. Build weekly review dashboard.

step.name: quarterly-tuning
step.action: Review per-cell trigger count; reclassify cells with chronic alerts; tighten/loosen SLOs as needed.
